Her anatomical right eye, right cheek, and right shoulder correspond to the original screen left and should appear moderately shortened and partly overlapped by the nose, facial front edge, and head contour.

occlusionConstraints: The nose may slightly overlap her anatomical right inner eye corner and right cheek, but must not incorrectly cover her anatomical left eye.
Wispy temple hair may partially cross her anatomical left ear, while the helix, lobe, and connection to the head remain coherent.
The bun overlaps the rear head contour, and loose strands may only partly cross the side of the neck without becoming an unnatural solid hair curtain.

Preserve the dark brown-black loose high bun, slightly off-center hairline part, fine temple strands on both sides, and loose neck hairs.
Preserve delicate natural skin, subtle warm eye makeup, no jewelry, no glasses, and a calm gentle expression.
Preserve the lightweight white square-neck top and its fine woven texture, adding no text, patterns, or logos.
